title.ko: 전자기계식 시계 또는 휴대 시계
title.en: ELECTROMECHANICAL CLOCKS OR WATCHES

definition.ko: 기계적 시계의 전기감기 G04C1/00 전기기계시계의 운동기구; 전기적 또는 전기적 탈진기 G04C3/00, G04C5/00 시각의 지시 광학적 음향적 수단 시각 맞춤 G04C17/00; 19/00; 21/00 전원 G04C9/00 동기화; 모자시계방식; 동기전동기시계 G04C10/00 예정시각에 장치를 조작하는 시계 G04C11/00; 13/00; 15/00 이 서브 클래스의 다른 그룹으로 분류되지 않는 주제사항 G04C23/00

title.ko: 기계 시계의 전기적 감기
title.en: Electric winding of mechanical clocks; Independent electric clocks or watches

title.ko: 기계 시계의 전기적 감기
title.en: Winding mechanical clocks electrically
by electromagnets
by electric motors with rotating or with reciprocating movement
winding-up springs
raising weights

title.ko: 권과 방지
title.en: Protection against overwinding
of the spring
of the weights

title.ko: 다른 시계와 독립적이고 운동이 전기적 수단에 의해 유지되는 전기기계식 시계 또는 휴대용 시계 (동기식 모터에 의한 시계 구동 G04C15/00)
title.en: Electromechanical clocks or watches independent of other time-pieces and in which the movement is maintained by electric means (clocks driven by synchronous motors G04C0015000000)

title.ko: 운동이 진자에 의해 조정되는 것
title.en: wherein movement is regulated by a pendulum

title.ko: 전원과 진자와의 전자기적 결합을 사용하는 것 (G04C3/033이 우선)
title.en: using electromagnetic coupling between electric power source and pendulum (G04C0003033000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 비틀림 진자를 사용하는 것; 원추 진자를 사용하는 것
title.en: using torsion pendulums; using conical pendulums
wherein movement is regulated by a balance
using electromagnetic coupling between electric power source and balance
wherein movement is regulated by a mechanical oscillator other than a pendulum or balance, e.g. by a tuning fork
driven by electromagnetic means
driven by piezoelectric means; driven by magnetostrictive means

title.ko: 스텝모터를 넣어 만든 것 (G04C3/02 - G04C3/12가 우선)
title.en: incorporating a stepping motor (G04C0003020000-G04C0003120000 take precedence)

title.ko: 연속 회전하는 전동기를 넣어 만든 것(3/02 ～ 3/12가 우선; 동기전동기에 의하여 구동되는 시계 15/00)
title.en: incorporating an electro-dynamic continuously rotating motor (G04C0003020000-G04C0003120000 take precedence)
incorporating electro-thermal or electro-pneumatic driving means

title.ko: 진동을 회전운동으로 변환하기 위한 시계에 있어서의 전기적 혹은 자기적 수단, 즉 전기적 또는 자기적 탈진기 (조정기 G04C3/00)
title.en: Electric or magnetic means for converting oscillatory to rotary motion in time-pieces, i.e. electric or magnetic escapements (regulators G04C0003000000)

title.ko: 시각 표시 수단을 설정하기 위한 전기적 작동장치 (보조 시계 G04C13/03)
title.en: Electrically-actuated devices for setting the time-indicating means  (of secondary clocks G04C0013030000)
by blocking the driving means

title.ko: 구동수단을 잘라 흩어지게 하는 것에 의한 것 (억제수단과 결합되는 것 G04C9/04)
title.en: by decoupling the driving means (combined with blocking means G04C0009040000)
by electric drive
Arrangements of electric power supplies in time-pieces
the power supply being a radioactive source
with means for indicating the condition of the power supply

title.ko: 독립적으로 구동되는 시계의 동기화
title.en: Electric clock installations; Primary-and-secondary clock systems; Synchronous-motor clocks

title.ko: 독립적으로 구동되는 시계의 동기화
title.en: Synchronisation of independently-driven clocks

title.ko: 전송선에 의한 것
title.en: over a line
with direct mechanical action on the time-indicating means
using an electric magnet or motor

title.ko: 모시계에 의한 시계구동기구
title.en: Driving mechanisms for clocks by primary clocks

title.ko: 회로 장치; 전기 시계 장치
title.en: Circuit arrangements; Electric clock installations
Pulse transmission systems with additional means for setting the time indication of secondary clocks

title.ko: 모시계
title.en: Primary clocks

title.ko: 접점기구(복수의 시계를 동시에 감아 올리는 것 G04C 1/00)
title.en: Contact devices (for simultaneously winding several clocks G04C0001000000)
Secondary clocks actuated intermittently
by electromechanical step-advancing mechanisms
with rotating armature
by continuously-rotating electric motors
by electrically-released mechanical driving mechanisms
Clocks driven by synchronous motors

title.ko: 전기적 수단에 의한 광학적 시각 표시 (G04C19/00이 우선)
title.en: Indicating the time or producing time signals electrically

title.ko: 전기적 수단에 의한 광학적 시각 표시 (G04C19/00이 우선)
title.en: Indicating the time optically by electric means (G04C0019000000 takes precedence)
by electric lamps
Producing optical time signals at prefixed times by electric means
by electric lamps
by indicating members moved electrically, e.g. flap, band

title.ko: 전기적 수단에 의하여 음향적 시각신호를 발생하는 것
title.en: Producing acoustic time signals by electrical means

title.ko: 구조의 세부(G04C 21/04, G04C 21/16이 우선)
title.en: Constructional details (G04C0021040000, G04C0021160000 take precedence)

title.ko: 시각의 표시
title.en: Indicating the time of the day
by striking mechanism
with snail
with locking plate
by electro-acoustic means
Electro-acoustic time announcement, i.e. spoken
producing the signals at adjustable fixed times
by mechanically unlocking an electromechanical vibrator, e.g. actuated by the leakage flux of the electric driving means
by closing a contact to ring an electromechanical alarm
put into action by the arbor of a mechanical alarm work
put into action by the spring of a mechanical alarm work
put into action by the vibrations caused by the operation of a mechanical alarm work
by closing a contact to put into action electro-acoustic means, e.g. awakening by music
with provision for a number of operations at different times, e.g. ringing the bells in a school
giving indications at a number of places, each at a different time, e.g. system of alarms in a hotel
Devices on watches or similar portable time-pieces
Signal-repeating devices
Adjusting the duration of signals

title.ko: 미리 선정된 시각 또는 미리 선정된 시간 간격의 후에 장치를 작동하는 부착되거나 내장되어 있는 시계 (전기적 방법으로 음향 시간 신호를 생성하는 것으로 제한되는 경우 G04C21/00)
title.en: Clocks with attached or built-in means operating any device at preselected times or after preselected time-intervals (if restricted to producing acoustic time signals by electrical means G04C0021000000)
Constructional details
Housings, supports, shielding, or similar stationary parts
Driving or regulating means
Programming means
for actuating any element which operates, or initiates the operation of, the device concerned
Electric circuitry
Mechanisms continuously running to relate the operation(s) to the time of day
acting only at one preselected time or during one adjustable time interval
for operating one device at a number of different times
with contacts operated, or formed, by clock hands or elements of similar form
with the actuating element carried by a disc
the actuating element controlling another element mechanically
for operating a number of devices at different times
with contacts operated, or formed, by clock hands or elements of similar form
with the actuating element carried by a disc
the actuating element controlling another element mechanically
with provision for automatic modification of the programme, e.g. on Sunday
by external influences

title.ko: 시작하는 시각에 관계없이 선택된 시간간격을 측정하는 기구
title.en: Mechanisms measuring a chosen time interval independently of the time of day at which the interval starts
using continuously-running mechanism

title.ko: 1개의 시간간격 끝에만 작동하는 것
title.en: acting only at the end of a single time interval
with provision for selection from a number of preset intervals

title.ko: 시간간격을 조정할 수 있는 것(G04C 23/44가 우선)
title.en: with provision for adjustment of the interval (G04C0023440000 takes precedence)
acting at the ends of successive time intervals
with provision for modification of the interval(s) by external influences
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
